intro: Aloe vera gel is a soothing and hydrating topical treatment derived from the aloe vera plant, widely used to calm irritated skin and promote wound healing. Rich in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as antioxidants and amino acids, aloe vera gel has anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce redness and swelling. When applied topically, aloe vera gel can provide instant relief from sunburns, minor cuts, and skin irritations, making it a popular natural remedy for skin care.
